text:
(a) Except as provided by Sections 548.503, 548.5035 (Initial Three-year Inspection of Certain Rental Vehicles) , and 548.504 (Inspection of Commercial Motor Vehicle) , the fee for inspection of a motor vehicle other than a moped is $12.50. The fee for inspection of a moped is $5.75.

Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B. 3297 ), Sec. 26(6), eff. January 1, 2025.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.501 — Inspection Fees Generally

(a) Except as provided by Sections 548.503, 548.5035 (Initial Three-year Inspection of Certain Rental Vehicles) , and 548.504 (Inspection of Commercial Motor Vehicle) , the fee for inspection of a motor vehicle other than a moped is $12.50. The fee for inspection of a moped is $5.75.

Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B. 3297 ), Sec. 26(6), eff. January 1, 2025.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 362 (S.B.2102), Sec. 5, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.label: a

Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B. 3297 ), Sec. 26(6), eff. January 1, 2025.
